analysis.headline: 8 learning candidates analyzed since 2026-05-13; 4 risky repositories excluded; top signal is topic:agent-skill.

repo_lessons.adoption_hypothesis: vercel-labs/zero is likely gaining attention because it combines C ecosystem fit.
emulate: Use a concrete one-sentence value proposition.
Keep license and reuse rights explicit.
Show active maintenance through recent commits.
avoid: Avoid copying surface topics without reproducing the proof path.

reasons: Topic clustering is strong around agent-skill, agent-skills, agentic-workflows, which makes the value proposition easy to search and share.
Unknown leads the language mix, so examples and packaging should respect that ecosystem.
AI and agent language is still a strong discovery hook when paired with a concrete workflow.

backlog.title: Ship a one-command demo loop
backlog.rationale: topic:agent-skill (1) is the strongest analysis signal, so the first success path should make that value obvious.
backlog.verification: A fresh clone can run the demo command and produce a report without secrets.

backlog.title: Publish daily trend evidence
backlog.rationale: The roadmap should show how current topic:agent-skill (1) evidence changes recommendations over time.
backlog.verification: A scheduled run updates a snapshot, star history, and daily brief.

backlog.title: Keep credentials optional and documented
backlog.rationale: Public GitHub data can be read unauthenticated, but tokens raise rate limits and enable repo automation.
backlog.verification: .env.local is ignored, `.env.example` is safe, and CI uses scoped tokens.

backlog.title: Expose the agent decisions as machine-readable JSON
backlog.rationale: Agent-oriented projects spread faster when downstream tools can reuse their decisions.
backlog.verification: The daily run writes both Markdown and JSON decision artifacts.

backlog.title: Create a public progress loop for Xiao-rx/agent-workbench
backlog.rationale: The target repository should show how trend data directly affects roadmap choices.
backlog.verification: The daily brief includes a target repo star sample and next action.

review_findings.title: Trend data contains risky repositories
review_findings.detail: 4 repository entries look like piracy, credential abuse, or spam magnets and should not be used as product inspiration.
